case_title: PAULINE MARIA MACK VS. FILLMORE HERRITAGE HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

DEPT. 506, SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-21-2011 - APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES, MATTER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN. 21, 2011 BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (DEFENDANT EXHIBIT RETAINED)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACK, PAULINE MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE HERRITAGE HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION NO PROOF OF HOA FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-06-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE HERRITAGE HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MACK, PAULINE MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE HERRITAGE HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
